notes: Same user cannot approve their own proposal. HTTP 403 returned on self-approval attempt.

assertions.label: Same user attempting /decide returns HTTP 403 Forbidden
assertions.detail: detail: Maker-checker violation: the deciding user cannot be the same as the requesting user.

selfApproveAttempt.title: Forbidden
selfApproveAttempt.detail: Maker-checker violation: the deciding user cannot be the same as the requesting user.
